opinion.h2: Anthony R. MARTIN-TRIGONA, petitioner, v. Nicholas GOULETAS et al No. 80- 5463
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Court of Appeals for the Seventh Circuit.
Justice STEVENS took no part in the consideration or decision of this petition.[ Martin-Trigona v. Gouletas 449 U.S. 1025 (1980) ]
